title: Otona no Jijou: Smartphone wo Nozoitara
original_title: おとなの事情 スマホをのぞいたら
overview: Seven men and women, consisting of three couples who are reluctant companions and one single man, play in the game with the secret that their relationship and friendship will collapse.  Japanese remake of the Italian movie "Perfetti sconosciuti".

trailers.title: 予告編
trailers.channel_name: ソニー・ピクチャーズ 映画
